creator: anubas@hotmail.com
text:
I should add that this does not happen with php56 extensions.

<output>
$ sudo pkg install php56-5.6.18 php56-dom-5.6.18 php56-gd-5.6.18 php56-hash-5.6.18 php56-iconv-5.6.18 php56-json-5.6.18 php56-ldap-5.6.18 php56-mcrypt-5.6.18 php56-mysqli-5.6.18 php56-odbc-5.6.18 php56-openssl-5.6.18 php56-session-5.6.18 php56-soap-5.6.18 php56-xml-5.6.18
